text: Being here, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The modern meeting room behind glass suggests purposeful gathering and shared ideas. Turning, I see the bold declaration of R+D—Research and Development. The wall celebrates innovation, blurring lines between human and machine. I feel inspired by the cultivated potential for discovery, yet aware of the sterile, almost clinical atmosphere. There is an excitement about creation, but also a longing for the unpredictable energy of lived experience.
